feed.title: ppmatrix docs
feed.subtitle: A Doc site for my homelab .

entry.title: Hello HomeLab
entry.summary: Welcome Hello and welcome to my HomeLab docs site! The idea of making an home laboratory, mini datacenter type for self hosting, came about when, for professional reasons while studying networks and data acquisition, I noticed that many people had this activity as an hobby. As programming is also an area that I dedicate myself to for many years, I thought it might be interesting to have my ...
